title: Bugly 质量概览 MCP 对接配置
description: 连接您的 Bugly 账号，用于查看产品的崩溃率、ANR 率、FOOM（OOM）率与启动耗时等质量概览。Token 仅存储在本机 ~/.workbuddy 下，不会上传云端。
description_en: Connect your Bugly account to view product quality overview such as crash rate, ANR rate, FOOM (OOM) rate, and startup latency. Token are stored locally in ~/.workbuddy only and are never uploaded to the cloud.
docLabel: 如何获取 Bugly Access Token？
docLabel_en: How to get Bugly Access Token?

fields.label: 密钥
fields.placeholder: 在 Bugly 控制台 → 右上角头像 → 个人令牌→ 复制密钥
fields.placeholder_en: In Bugly Console -> top-right avatar -> Personal Tokens -> copy the key
fields.description: 用于访问 Bugly OpenAPI 的个人访问令牌，将以 Authorization: Bearer 形式注入请求头。
fields.description_en: Personal access token for Bugly OpenAPI, injected into the request header as Authorization: Bearer.
